payload.name: ai
payload.short_summary: Artificial intelligence leverages computers and machines to mimic the problem-solving and decision-making capabilities found in humans and in nature.

payload.name: javascript
payload.short_summary:
Once relegated to the browser as one of the 3 core technologies of the web, JavaScript can now be found almost anywhere you find code. 

JavaScript developers move fast and push software development forward; they can be as opinionated as the frameworks they use, so let's keep it clean here and make it a place to learn from each other!

payload.name: beginners
payload.short_summary: "A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step." -Chinese Proverb

payload.name: productivity
payload.short_summary: Productivity includes tips on how to use tools and software, process optimization, useful references, experience, and mindstate optimization.

payload.name: tutorial
payload.short_summary:
Tutorial is a general purpose tag. We welcome all types of tutorial - code related or not! 

It's all about learning, and using tutorials to teach others!

payload.name: devops
payload.short_summary: Content centering around the shifting left of responsibility, deconstruction of responsibility silos, and the automation of repetitive work tasks.

payload.name: react
payload.short_summary: Official tag for Facebook's React JavaScript library for building user interfaces
